title: geranium moschatum
intro: Geranium moschatum, also known as the sweet-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geranium moschatum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geranium moschatum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
